75516.subject: Your Project: My Roport is at risk of suspension
75516.body:
Google Cloud Platform Go to my console »





Action required


Dear Google customer,


You are receiving this email because you are a Google Cloud Platform,  
Firebase, or API customer.


The billing account that project "My Roport" (my-roport) is billed to  
(01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD) is past due or does not have valid payment  
information associated with it. This may happen if your credit card has  
expired or was cancelled.

To ensure that your services are not interrupted, please ask your billing  
administrator to update your billing account with valid payment information  
by following this link:  
https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD/manage?project=my-roport


If you have already updated your payment information, please disregard this  
message.

If you have any questions please contact us using this form:  
https://support.google.com/code/contact/cloud_platform_billing







The Google team





Google Plus Twitter Blogger



© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform, Firebase, APIs, or to your  
account.

75515.subject:
Action required: your billing account 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD is past
 due or has invalid payment information.
75515.body:
Google Cloud Platform Go to my console »





Action required


Dear Google customer,


You are receiving this email because you are a Google Cloud Platform,  
Firebase, or API customer.


Our records indicate that your billing account: 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD is  
past due or does not have valid payment information associated with it.  
This may happen if your credit card has expired or was cancelled, and we  
haven't received valid payment information from you.

Please update your billing account with valid payment information by  
following this link:

https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD/settings


Failure to make payments may result in suspension and/or termination of  
your billing account and the related Project(s) or Service(s). Note that  
some services might already be impacted. If you have already updated your  
payment information, please disregard this message.

If you have any questions please contact us using this form:  
https://support.google.com/code/contact/cloud_platform_billing







The Google team

important changes to Google Cloud Platform, Firebase, APIs, or to your

75513.subject: Visa and Stripe back Open USD, a stablecoin that pays its partners 😳🪙; 𝕏 Money just launched with 6% APY and a …
75513.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse406

👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed this week:
Claude Fable 5 Is Back. Here’s Exactly What to Build Before the Free Window Closes [ https://substack.com/redirect/f6fcb96d-73f8-4308-8b47-f18c0865b8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] ⌛ [ https://substack.com/redirect/f6fcb96d-73f8-4308-8b47-f18c0865b8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The highest-leverage use cases, money-making workflows, and copy-paste prompts for founders, builders, investors, and entrepreneurs, while Fable 5 is still included in your plan]
Attention Is the New Startup Infrastructure: The Founder’s Playbook for Winning in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/5f218282-4884-4031-932d-8306629fdad7?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📚 [ https://substack.com/redirect/5f218282-4884-4031-932d-8306629fdad7?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Inside a16z’s “go-direct as a service” model — and the exact moves founders need to turn attention into customers, hires, and capital]
GLM-5.2: The ChatGPT Moment for Local AI [ https://substack.com/redirect/14ad03d9-7f0a-4d34-b95c-a155f3bc1468?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/14ad03d9-7f0a-4d34-b95c-a155f3bc1468?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Why the first open-weight model that rivals Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 — and runs on a single Mac — changes the game for every founder, builder, and investor]
Turn Claude Into an AI Research Powerhouse With Stanford’s STORM Method [ https://substack.com/redirect/3f947e5a-f650-40eb-9904-3e81a2d35950?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🧠 [ https://substack.com/redirect/3f947e5a-f650-40eb-9904-3e81a2d35950?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Stanford’s proven AI research framework, adapted for Claude — with copy-paste prompts and a ready-made Skill]
SoFi’s Q1 2026: the Everything App is becoming an everything earner [ https://substack.com/redirect/b562cdfe-8716-4f4f-b127-aac25673ab1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📱💸 [ https://substack.com/redirect/b562cdfe-8716-4f4f-b127-aac25673ab1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [deep dive into SoFi’s Q1 2026, breaking the most importat financial facts & figures to see if it’s worth your time and money + bonus deep dives into Robinhood [ htt

75512.subject: Has China obtained the world’s most important machine?
75512.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEkrP_MFWrtXkla6LCO-H3XhmkksjA4ciiUlVYsYjf9MBgZ3-qkPuaECagvXzKGbUcXO5k2kyo7UZVY7RUbf5z92eQnSaufYrcvl6IfIKw 

July 5th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 A Sunday edition of our daily newsletter


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEksHlWCO4D39iEEkHATyqwWvToFjXagHGNEYAQ5oxjUG2NUj4IkZ7Wpk1UOWed5SCl05Kkpr2AJTD0CT0EclFgoMJE_Z9-oYz0vJgm2Tw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEktUg8EEDBpN2JbnsQn-WyykWR44_Fxnftn60GcIDKhDRHPW7nP3isgiE_twO82SxXEqDI4l8OhShvK7GhRLnywgw_y8M6if4n81JtPvA 


 


 
 

Roger McShane

US digital editor



The extreme ultraviolet lithography machine, which makes the most advanced semiconductors, is arguably the world’s most important device. It is made only by ASML, a Dutch company. Now the Trump administration has thrown the firm into crisis by warning that one of its 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEkuwKFynGh3fpKpjOqtl0S_taG08_BcqfLXiN_j-q6-hr5IYh3PWKrZK4bYWC-FTzQ0ewudrGtom-fAK_BDTmVMp00I-Pmi0qKl 
machines may have reached China . Impossible, says ASML.


Elsewhere, women have made extraordinary professional gains in recent decades. Yet their progress at the very top has stalled: their share of C-suite positions is falling. 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAA
